title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
